description: Esparex Monorepo Canonical Ownership Registry — Single Source of Truth for Domain, Package, and Module Ownership Boundaries

packages/contracts.name: Monorepo SSOT API Contracts & DTOs
packages/contracts.boundary: Provides Zod schemas, API DTOs, request/response payload contracts across all HTTP and RPC boundaries.

packages/kernel.name: Monorepo Domain Kernel
packages/kernel.boundary: Provides shared base domain events, integration event contracts, and core value objects.

packages/ui.name: Monorepo Shared UI Design System
packages/ui.boundary: Provides accessible UI component primitives (Button, Dialog, Input, Popup) and presentation hooks.

core/src/domains.name: DDD Bounded Contexts
core/src/domains.boundary: Encapsulates core domain business logic, entities, application services, ports, and repository adapters.

shared/src.name: Monorepo Shared Utilities & Constants
shared/src.boundary: Provides domain constants, geofencing helpers, API route path definitions, and headless logic.

backend/api.name: Express HTTP API Server
backend/api.boundary: Exposes HTTP routes, middleware, controllers, and maps HTTP requests to core domain services.

apps/web.name: Next.js User Web Application
apps/web.boundary: User-facing web portal, Next.js App Router pages, user components, and client-side hooks.

apps/admin.name: Next.js Platform Admin Dashboard
apps/admin.boundary: Admin management portal, moderation workflows, user management, system operations UI.
